critic_findings.message: The entire carrier-data-entry form block (~85 lines) is copy-pasted verbatim at lines 157-242 and again at lines 246-330. The only difference is indentation (inside vs outside the two-column grid). Extract to a partial _carrier_form.html.erb.

applyExtraction() cyclomatic complexity is 15 (base 1 + 14 branches: if(!raw), try/catch, 2x if(!row), if(carrierName), if(carrierSelect), if(option), if(grossPremium), if(grossInput), if(netPremium), if(netInput), if(commissionPct), if(commissionInput), if(participationPct)). Max is 8. Split field-mapping into a helper that handles one field at a time, or consolidate the per-field if/querySelector/dispatch/mark pattern into a single applyField(fieldName, selector, value) method.

The .document-tab <button> has focus:outline-none with no focus:ring-* replacement. Keyboard users get no visible focus indicator. Add focus:ring-2 focus:ring-teal-500 (matching the pattern already used on the Apply button at line 146).

Pending Atlas extraction state renders a static yellow dot (●) with no spinner animation and no Turbo polling / meta-refresh. The requirements state: 'If Atlas extraction pending, spinner shown; polling via Turbo or page refresh.' Neither animate-spin nor any polling mechanism is present.

BillingTask.includes(deal: [:documents, :retailer]) on line 11 eager-loads :documents, but line 15 immediately re-queries the same association as @task.deal.documents.includes(:atlas_extraction).order(...), which issues a new SQL query and discards the preloaded records. The :documents in the line 11 includes clause is wasted. Remove :documents from the includes on line 11.
